examples: The edge is as blunt as an old butter knife.
The police said he had been hit with a blunt instrument.
I hate to be blunt, Frankie, but she just didn't strike me as being very ladylike.
Blunt was a virtually innocent victim, we were told, and the only villain was the press.
You could get this sort of agreement on a UK level, but the European system is too blunt.
